spec.query:
from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] =~ /^${operator:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] != "Watermarks")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> group(columns: ["operator_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Throughput")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsInPerSecond")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] =~ /^${operator:regex}$/ and r["operator_name"] != "Watermarks")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> group(columns: ["operator_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Throughput")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_taskSlotsTotal" or 
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_taskSlotsAvailable" or 
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_numRegisteredTaskManagers")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_measurement"])
  |> yield(name: "Status")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] =~ /.*Status_JVM_GarbageCollector_(G1_Young_Generation|G1_Old_Generation)_Count/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> toFloat()
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_measurement"])

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] =~ /.*Status_JVM_GarbageCollector_(G1_Young_Generation|G1_Old_Generation)_Time/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> toFloat()
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "GC Time Rate")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsInPerSecond" or r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rate")
  |> toFloat()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => 
      (r["operator_name"] =~ /.*Source/ and r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsInPerSecond") or 
      (r["operator_name"] =~ /.*Sink: Writer/ and r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsOutPerSecond")
  )
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Throughput_E2E")

import "strings"

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] =~ /^taskmanager_job_task_latency.*latency$/)
  // |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "mean" or r["_field"] == "p95" or r["_field"] == "p99")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "mean")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /.*Writer.*/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      _time: r._time,
      _value: r._value,
      _field: r._field,
      task_name: strings.split(v: r.task_name, t: " -> ")[0] 
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["task_name", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "E2E_Latency_Final")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_job_task_isBackPressured")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["task_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if string(v: r._value) == "true" or string(v: r._value) == "1" then 1 else 0 }))
  |> yield(name: "Backpressure")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  // Usiamo una regex per catturare in modo sicuro il nome lungo della measurement
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] =~ /^taskmanager_job_task_latency.*latency$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["task_name"] =~ /^${task:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "mean") 
  |> group(columns: ["task_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Mean Latency")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_lastCheckpointDuration" or r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_lastCheckpointSize")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])
  |> yield(name: "Checkpoints")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_numberOfCompletedCheckpoints" or 
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_numberOfInProgressCheckpoints" or
                       r["_measurement"] == "jobmanager_job_numberOfFailedCheckpoints")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement"])
  // Prendiamo il valore più recente (last) visto che sono contatori incrementali
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_measurement"])
  |> yield(name: "CheckpointCounts")

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_CPU_Load")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0 }))

import "strings"

from(bucket: "flink-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_Memory_Heap_Used" or r["_measurement"] == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_Memory_Heap_Max")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      r with 
      type: if r._measurement == "taskmanager_Status_JVM_Memory_Heap_Used" then "Used Heap" else "Max Heap",
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["host", "type"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
